entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE UPPER 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS AROUND 40

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF RAIN SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 20

MOSTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 40S
